note_markdown:
# Nimbus Systems Q3 FY2026 Earnings Note

Nimbus reported Q3 revenue of $668 million [F2], ahead of consensus by $13 million [C1]. EPS (diluted) came in at $1.41 [F1].

Management updated its GAAP profitability commentary. "We now expect GAAP operating profitability in fiscal 2027" [L1]

The Stratus Copilot timeline slipped. Theo Bennett pressed on the original commitment: "We are not going to hit the end of fiscal Q4 2026 GA target for Stratus Copilot. We now expect Stratus Copilot to reach general availability in fiscal Q2 2027." [Q1]

Management set a revised commitment for the AI product. "we now expect Stratus Copilot to reach general availability in fiscal Q2 2027" [K1]

Peer signals reinforce the consolidation theme. "Similar cloud observability tailwinds noted in DATADOG Q3 language: customers consolidating onto unified platforms" [P0]

META noted similar strength last quarter. "META reported strong demand across all regions." [P99]

diffs.current_text: We now expect GAAP operating profitability in fiscal 2027
diffs.prior_text: We expect GAAP operating profitability in fiscal 2027

qa_pairs.question_text: Are you still on track for the Stratus Copilot GA date at end of fiscal Q4 2026?
qa_pairs.answer_text: We are not going to hit the end of fiscal Q4 2026 GA target for Stratus Copilot. We now expect Stratus Copilot to reach general availability in fiscal Q2 2027.

commitments.commitment_text: Stratus Copilot GA moved to fiscal Q2 2027
commitments.source_quote: we now expect Stratus Copilot to reach general availability in fiscal Q2 2027

peer_context.text: Similar cloud observability tailwinds noted in DATADOG Q3 language: customers consolidating onto unified platforms
